remember: Students will be able to recall the major nomadic empires in history, including the Mongols, Huns, and Scythians.
Students will be able to identify the geographical regions and time periods associated with these empires.
understand: Students will be able to explain the reasons behind the emergence and rise of nomadic empires, including environmental factors and conflict with settled societies.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of nomadic empires on the development of trade, culture, and politics in different regions.
apply: Students will be able to compare and contrast the characteristics and achievements of different nomadic empires.
Students will be able to evaluate the significance of nomadic empires in shaping world history.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the causes and consequences of nomadic invasions and migrations, including their effects on local populations and the environment.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of nomadic empires in the development of global trade networks and cultural exchange.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: Students will be able to explain the emergence and rise of nomadic empires in the ancient world.
As per NCERT objective 2: Students will be able to describe the impact of nomadic empires on the development of trade and culture in different regions.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the major nomadic empires of the ancient world and their geographical and cultural contexts.
Describe the impact of nomadic invasions and migrations on local populations and the environment.
Compare and contrast the characteristics and achievements of different nomadic empires.
